---
name: Design Decision
about: Propose or document a concrete design decision with a clear outcome.
title: "[Design]"
labels: design-decision
assignees: ''

---

## Context
Describe the problem, system or decision that needs to be addressed.

---

## Constraints
List known constraints, goals or non-goals.
Examples:
- Performance requirements
- Design principles
- Technical limitations

---

## Options
Describe possible approaches or alternatives.
This section is optional but encouraged.

---

## Decision
Leave this section empty initially.
Fill it when the issue is resolved to document the final decision and reasoning.
